item.datamatrix.compact_disc.lore:
An optical storage device, commonly used for storing audio information.
Can also slice pizza, if you're brave enough.
item.datamatrix.shoddy_memory.lore:
A crudely manufactured storage device.
Due to it's poor craftsmanship, it's capacity is §lunpredictable.
block.datamatrix.universal_adapter.lore:
A mysterious device that can interact with all forms of media in Datamatrix.
(cannot be crafted!)
